channel.title: CaptiMac Updates
channel.description: Most recent CaptiMac releases with links to updates.

item.title: CaptiMac v2.3-beta.3 (2304)
item.description:
🆕 What's New

  • Apple Tips Onboarding — 9 interactive tips guide you through CaptiMac in 2 phases
  • Developer ID Distribution — works on any Mac, notarized by Apple
  • Multi-Provider Transcription — Groq + OpenAI + ElevenLabs in onboarding & settings
  • Emoji Toggle Tip — now part of the guided tour

🔧 Improvements

  • Ollama download with real-time progress + cancel
  • Coverage audit: 97% accuracy for all languages (Unicode-aware)
  • WhisperKit language code fix (Danish, German, etc.)
  • Provider switch isolation — no more stale URLs
  • LicenseManager warning fixed

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • CapCut MP3 export now works (Joint Stereo + uppercase fix)
  • Fase 2 tips overlay animation fixed
  • Onboarding tips appear after onboarding, not during
  • Release notes synced to current version
